strengths: Clearly identifies three specific real-world objects and their contexts
Explicitly states the chosen IA prompt at the start, providing focused framing
Links each object to the prompt with brief explanations and some external references
Demonstrates emerging awareness of how TOK concepts manifest in everyday contexts
weaknesses: Commentary remains largely descriptive and generalized, lacking analytical depth
Justifications for two of the objects are uneven and rely on broad assertions
Repetition of ideas (eg, âinformed decisionsâ) across sections reduces critical engagement
References are listed but not integrated into the discussion, and TOK terminology is underused
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition fulfils the criteria for the 5â6 band: three specific objects are clearly identified and linked to the IA prompt, with a recognisable real-world context and some supporting evidence. However, the analysis lacks the precision, critical depth and integration of TOK vocabulary and sources required for the 7â8 band. Uneven development of justifications, descriptive treatment of claims and failure to pose or interrogate explicit knowledge questions constrain its overall strength. Given these factors, a score of 5 out of 10 accurately reflects the workâs position within the lower half of the 5â6 band.

annotations.comment: This justification is underdeveloped and ends abruptly; deepen the analysis by connecting how the examâs economic knowledge raises specific implications for decision-making and ethical responsibility.
This sentence adds little new insight, repeating earlier points about informed choices; instead, sharpen the focus by critically linking economic literacy to the IA promptâs knowledge implications.
This analysis outlines ethical tensions but does not explore how knowledge of production practices shapes moral decisions; explicitly tie back to the IA prompt on knowledge implications.
While context for fast fashion is clear, this section would benefit from contrasting stakeholder perspectives (e.g., producers vs. consumers) to avoid a one-sided analysis.
The student acknowledges environmental implications of the industry, enriching the exhibitionâs ethical dimension.
The student has clearly stated the selected IA prompt at the start, providing a focused framing for the exhibition and ensuring the real-world contexts will relate back to this guiding question.
The introduction is generic and lacks precise definitions or an articulated knowledge question; consider defining key terms and posing a clear TOK question to frame your analysis more rigorously.
The opening discussion does not explicitly reference the IA prompt; link your introductory overview directly to the chosen prompt to reinforce coherence throughout.
The object is clearly identified as a specific IB economics exam paper, establishing a concrete real-world context for the TOK exploration.
The commentary on the supply-demand graph remains descriptive of economic content and does not engage with TOK concepts such as the role of models or assumptions influencing knowledge.
The paragraph lists economic outcomes descriptively; strengthen it by evaluating how underlying assumptions about inflation and unemployment shape our interpretation of personal finance choices.
Repetition of âtoma de decisionesâ across sections reduces analytical depth; introduce a contrasting perspective or counterclaim to enrich the critical discussion.
The microscope is situated clearly within the Natural Sciences, clarifying its real-world context and relevance for exploring how technology enables new knowledge.
While the image is described factually, the commentary fails to examine how the microscope alters ways of knowing or introduces methodological biases; expand on this TOK link.
The student highlights how microscopy provides access to previously unseen phenomena, demonstrating an emerging awareness of its impact on knowledge creation.
This discussion of the knowledge-production cycle is descriptive; to deepen TOK analysis, interrogate potential limitations of scientific methods or ethical considerations in research.
The paragraph is cut off and lacks a conclusion; ensure the implications of not having microscope technology are fully developed and explicitly tied back to the IA prompt.
The third object is clearly identified as personal Converse sneakers, setting a focused context for discussion of consumer culture and ethics.
The student effectively connects the sneakers to the fast fashion industry, highlighting real-world ethical implications and societal impacts.
The microscope section would benefit from integrating TOK terminology (e.g., âways of knowingâ, âbiasâ, âknowledge frameworksâ) to enhance theoretical precision.
This section asserts the need for informed decisions but does not illustrate how knowledge frameworks guide ethical judgments; include specific examples or propose a knowledge question.
The references header is appropriately placed but the sources are not integrated into the body of the exhibition; use in-text citations to strengthen evidential support.
References are listed comprehensively but without integration; directly cite and discuss key insights from these sources within each objectâs analysis.
Source formatting is inconsistent, which may detract from the exhibitionâs credibility; adopt a single citation style and ensure each entry is complete.
URLs are listed without context; consider summarizing key findings or arguments from each source in the commentary rather than relying solely on appended links.

rubricCriterionStrandBandContents.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.

rubricCriterionStrands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?

similarExemplars.title: How can we reconcile the relentless drive to pursue knowledge with the finite resources we have available? Discuss with reference to the natural sciences and one other area of knowledge.
